first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in substance. The scores are the same (6/10), and both identify the same core strengths (AI/MCP tooling experience, high-throughput systems background) and the same critical concerns (lack of Python, insufficient evidence of Staff-level strategic scope). The minor differences in wording and phrasing are well within the expected range of run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in reasoning based on the candidate's location.
